data.title: Nvidia, Alphabet To Back OpenAI Co-Founder Ilya Sutskever's New AI Startup Safe Superintelligence: Report
data.description: Alphabet and Nvidia have reportedly invested in Ilya Sutskever's $32 billion AI startup Safe Superintelligence, as tech giants deepen ties with top AI labs that also serve as major customers for their cloud and chip infrastructure.

data.title: Elon Musk's Political Fallout Fuels Record Dump of Used Tesla Cars — Now Selling For Thousands Below Market Value
data.description: A record number of Tesla owners are selling their vehicles amid backlash over Elon Musk's political affiliations, driving used Tesla listings up 67% year-over-year and pushing prices roughly $10,000 below those of competing EVs.

data.title: Elon Musk's Government Efficiency Push Falls Short As Treasury Data Shows Spending Up Sharply Since Trump's Inauguration: Report
data.description: Despite Elon Musk's claims that the Department of Government Efficiency has saved $150 billion, federal spending under Trump's second term has increased by $154 billion, driven largely by rising entitlement costs and debt interest payments, with limited short-term impact from DOGE's cuts.

data.title: Ross Gerber Says, 'The Simplest Way To Get Back To ATH Is To Reverse Everything Trump Has Done.' Even A Rumor, He Says, Sent Markets Soaring
'We Are Heading For A Self-Induced, Economic Nuclear Winter.' Billionaire Investor Bill Ackman Has Turned On Trump Over Tariffs
